import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut best_start = 0
  mut best_len = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut ws = 32
  mut start = 0
  mut in_word = false
  while i < n
    let bopt = string.byte_at(line, i)
    let b = match bopt
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      ws
    end
    if is_ws(b)
      if in_word
        let wlen = i - start
        if wlen > best_len
          best_len = wlen
          best_start = start
        end
        in_word = false
      end
    else
      if not in_word
        in_word = true
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_word
    let wlen = n - start
    if wlen > best_len
      best_len = wlen
      best_start = start
    end
  end
  let word = string.substring(line, best_start, best_start + best_len)
  print("longest=#{word}")
end
